name: Window
description: The top-level container. Holds tabs, a draggable header, and a close button.
snippet:
local Window = SpaceUI:CreateWindow({
    Title        = "My Script",
    SubTitle     = "v1.0",
    Size         = UDim2.fromOffset(520, 420),
    ToggleKey    = Enum.KeyCode.RightShift,
    ConfigFolder = "MyScript",
})

props.name: SubTitle
props.desc: Dim subtitle shown next to the title.

props.name: ConfigFolder
props.desc: Subfolder under SpaceUI/ for config saves.

name: Tab
description: A page inside a window. Rendered as an entry in the left sidebar.
snippet:
local Combat = Window:AddTab({ Name = "Combat" })
local Movement = Window:AddTab({ Name = "Movement" })

props.name: Name
props.desc: Tab label shown in the sidebar.

props.name: Icon
props.desc: Optional rbxassetid for a tab icon.

name: Section
description: A titled group inside a tab with a thin hairline under its title.
snippet:
local ESP = Combat:AddSection("ESP")
ESP:AddToggle({ Name = "Enable", Default = false })

name: Button
description: A clickable action. Fires Callback on press.

name: Toggle
description: Boolean switch. Off is a dark pill, On is a white pill with a black knob.
snippet:
Tab:AddToggle({
    Name        = "Enable ESP",
    Description = "Boxes, names, distance",
    Default     = false,
    Flag        = "esp_enabled",
    Callback    = function(v) print("ESP:", v) end,
})

props.name: Callback
props.desc: Fires with the new value when the toggle changes.

name: Slider
description: A numeric value between Min and Max, snapped to Increment. White fill, mono readout on the right.
snippet:
Tab:AddSlider({
    Name      = "Max Distance",
    Min       = 0,
    Max       = 1000,
    Default   = 300,
    Increment = 1,
    Suffix    = "studs",
    Flag      = "esp_max",
    Callback  = function(v) end,
})

name: Dropdown
description: Single- or multi-select from a list of options. The floating panel is parented to an overlay layer so it never clips.
snippet:
Tab:AddDropdown({
    Name     = "Target Mode",
    Options  = { "Closest", "LowHealth", "Random" },
    Default  = "Closest",
    Multi    = false,
    Flag     = "target_mode",
    Callback = function(v) end,
})

props.name: Multi
props.desc: When true, Callback receives a table of selected names.

name: Input
description: Single-line text field. Callback fires on FocusLost.
snippet:
Tab:AddInput({
    Name         = "Custom Name",
    Placeholder  = "Enter a value",
    Default      = "",
    ClearOnFocus = false,
    Flag         = "custom_name",
    Callback     = function(v) print(v) end,
})

name: Keybind
description: Click to rebind. Shows '...' while capturing the next key or mouse button.

props.name: Callback
props.desc: Fires when the bound input is pressed.

name: ColorPicker
description: HSV picker. Chrome is monochrome; the SV/hue panel is the only place colour renders — because, well, it IS a colour picker.

name: Label
description: A single line of dim text. Useful for tips and annotations.
snippet: Tab:AddLabel("Press RightShift to toggle the UI.")

name: Paragraph
description: A titled block of body text inside a thin-bordered card. Wraps automatically.

name: Divider
description: A thin horizontal hairline. Use to separate logical blocks within a section.

name: Notification
description: Top-right toast that slides in from the right and auto-dismisses. Stacks with other notifications.
